title: Add Adapter Memory TTT submission
author: Hetul803

data.description: Adds an eval-time adapter memory extension with a fixed random feature projection A and zero-initialized trainable projection B, updated after scoring each chunk.

novel_contributions: Rank-1024 eval-time adapter memory extension on top of score-first TTT
Preserves score-first legality by updating the adapter only after each chunk is scored
Uses a fixed random feature projection A and zero-initialized trainable projection B
Reports 1M-token slice validation improvements across three seeds
